message:
🐛 Use deduplicated clusters in drill-down dialogs (#1623)

The Healthy/Unhealthy/Offline cluster stat blocks on the dashboard use
deduplicated clusters for their counts, but the drill-down dialog they
open was using raw clusters — showing duplicate contexts pointing to the
same server. Now the all-clusters drill-down uses deduplicatedClusters
so the dialog matches the stat block counts.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
